summary: Iteration 143: Mira AI Navigation and Product Cards Testing. All backend tests pass (7/7). Frontend UI verified: 1) Mira shows visual product cards with images (Shopify CDN URLs), prices, and Add buttons, 2) Concierge action returns navigate_to for cake requests (/celebrate/cakes), 3) Concierge action returns navigate_to for grooming requests (/groom), 4) Service wizard in navbar works with service buttons (Grooming, Vet Care, Training, Boarding, Birthday Cake), 5) Mira side drawer stays open on desktop (positioned at x=1496, right edge).

integration_issues.issue: Mira chat grooming request returns navigate_to=/groom in API, but service wizard Grooming button navigates to /care?type=grooming instead. Both are valid but inconsistent.

backend_api_tests.test_mira_chat_returns_products_with_ima: PASS - Products have https:// image URLs
backend_api_tests.test_celebrate_category_in_concierge_tri: PASS - Celebrate category triggers concierge action

mira_product_cards.buttons: Add buttons present on all product cards

mira_side_drawer_desktop.layout: Side drawer on right edge as expected

birthday_cake_navigation.page_content: Birthday Cakes Made with Joy page with celebration options

grooming_navigation.page_content: Care That Knows Your Pet page with grooming options

concierge_ticket_creation.message: Request created. Our live concierge® will get back to you shortly!

critical_code_review_comments: MiraChatWidget correctly handles concierge_action.navigate_to with toast notification and setTimeout navigation
Backend mira_routes.py correctly adds 'celebrate' category to CONCIERGE_ACTION_TRIGGERS with cake/birthday/party keywords
Navigation logic (lines 3163-3195) correctly maps keywords to routes: cake→/celebrate/cakes, grooming→/groom, vet→/care, etc.
Product cards in chat response have View and Add buttons with proper click handlers
Product images use Shopify CDN URLs (https://cdn.shopify.com/...) with Unsplash fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira AI navigation features verified: 1) Cake requests return navigate_to=/celebrate/cakes with scroll_to_section=cake-selection, 2) Grooming requests return navigate_to=/groom with show_wizard=grooming_booking, 3) Product cards show in chat with Shopify CDN images and Add buttons, 4) Service wizard in navbar works with all service buttons, 5) Mira side drawer stays open on desktop (x=1496). All backend APIs pass.
